page.title: Halloween Yacht Party in Marbella: Spooky Ideas for Your Charter

data.meta_description: Plan a Halloween yacht party in Marbella with spooky decor, themed catering, and fleet options from €749. Book your charter today.
data.summary: Discover spooky ideas for a Halloween yacht party in Marbella, from themed decor and costumes to catering and fleet options starting at €749. This guide covers everything you need to host a memorable celebration on the water.
key_facts: Fleet includes Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) and Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) from €749/2h.
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT.
Larger yachts like Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) available from €4,719/4h with free jet ski.
Departures from Puerto Banús, with cruising to Marbella Marina, Cabopino, or Estepona.
Spooky decor, costumes, and themed catering can be arranged on request.
October sea temperatures average 20°C, ideal for swimming stops.
Book via WhatsApp for custom pricing on boats not in Tier A or B.

faq.q: Can I decorate the yacht for a Halloween party?
faq.a: Yes, you can bring your own decorations or arrange themed decor through us. Popular ideas include fake cobwebs, LED candles, and orange/black bunting. Just ensure decorations are non-toxic and safe for the marine environment.

faq.q: What is the cost of a Halloween yacht party in Marbella?
faq.a: Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours, including skipper, drinks, and snacks. Larger yachts like the Mangusta 80 cost from €4,719 for 4 hours, with a free jet ski included. Contact us via WhatsApp for custom quotes.

faq.q: How many guests can I invite?
faq.a: Capacity varies by boat: Astondoa 40 holds up to 9 passengers, Azimut 39 up to 11, and Mangusta 80 up to 12. For larger groups, consider the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) or Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax). All boats depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: What is included in the charter?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT (21%). Themed catering or additional drinks can be arranged on request.

faq.q: Can I play spooky music on board?
faq.a: Yes, all our yachts have sound systems compatible with Bluetooth or AUX. You can bring your own playlist or request a Halloween-themed DJ for an additional fee.

faq.q: Is it safe to swim in October?
faq.a: October sea temperatures around Marbella average 20°C, which is comfortable for a quick dip. Our skippers know sheltered spots like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for calm swimming stops.

faq.q: What time should I start the party?
faq.a: Sunset in October is around 7:30 PM, making a late afternoon or early evening departure ideal for a spooky twilight atmosphere. Daytime charters also work well for family-friendly Halloween fun.

faq.q: How do I book a Halloween yacht party?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and custom pricing. We recommend booking at least a week in advance for Halloween dates (late October).

data.body_html:
Halloween on the Costa del Sol doesn't have to mean crowded clubs or predictable house parties. A Halloween yacht party in Marbella offers a unique blend of luxury, privacy, and spooky coastal vibes. Whether you want a twilight cruise past Puerto Banús, a themed swim stop at Cala del Faro, or a full-blown costume bash on a 24-metre Mangusta, our fleet has you covered. Here's how to plan an unforgettable Halloween charter with us.

Why Choose a Yacht for Halloween?

Hosting a Halloween party on a yacht gives you exclusive access to Marbella's coastline without the noise or crowds. You control the guest list, the music, and the itinerary. Plus, the October sunset over La Concha creates a naturally dramatic backdrop for spooky photos. Our boats depart from Puerto Banús, so you're minutes from the Golden Mile and Marbella Marina.

Spooky Decor Ideas

Transform your charter into a haunted vessel with minimal effort. Bring fake cobwebs, orange and black bunting, and battery-operated LED candles for a safe glow. For a more immersive experience, consider UV-reactive decorations that pop against the white upholstery of boats like the Azimut 58 Flybridge. Avoid real flames or loose glitter, which can damage the interior and harm marine life.

Costume Themes for Your Group

Classic pirate or ghost themes work well on a yacht, but you can also try 'underwater creatures' (mermaids, sharks, jellyfish) or 'Hollywood horror' (Dracula, Frankenstein, witches). If your group is on a Tier A boat like the Astondoa 40 (9 pax), a coordinated theme keeps photos cohesive. For larger groups on the Mangusta 80 (12 pax), mix and match for variety.

Halloween Catering and Drinks

Our standard charter includes water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. For Halloween, you can upgrade to themed catering: think 'blood-red' sangria, pumpkin-shaped sandwiches, or spider-web cupcakes. Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange a custom menu. All food and drink are served by your skipper, so you can relax and enjoy the party.

Best Boats for a Halloween Party

Our fleet offers options for every group size and budget. Here's a quick comparison:

BoatLengthMax PaxPrice (2h)Highlights
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749Affordable, stylish, ideal for small groups
Azimut 3912.5m11€749Spacious cockpit, good for costumes
Mangusta 80 (White)24m12€4,719/4hLuxury, free jet ski, ample deck space
Ferretti 9429m12On requestUltra-luxury, perfect for VIP Halloween

For a full list of boats, visit our fleet page.

Itinerary Ideas for a Spooky Cruise

A typical Halloween charter could start in the late afternoon from Puerto Banús. Cruise towards Marbella Marina for golden-hour photos, then head to Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for a swim stop. As dusk falls, anchor near Cabopino or Estepona for a spooky dinner under the stars. Your skipper will tailor the route to your preferences.

Music and Entertainment

Bring your own Halloween playlist via Bluetooth or AUX. For a premium experience, we can arrange a DJ or sound system upgrade on larger yachts like the Mangusta 80 or K80. Consider adding a photo booth with props for memorable shots. Our skippers are happy to help with timing and atmosphere.

Safety and Weather Tips

October weather in Marbella is mild, with average highs of 24°C and sea temperatures around 20°C. Bring a light jacket for the evening cruise. All our boats are fully insured and equipped with life jackets, first aid kits, and fire extinguishers. Your skipper will ensure safe anchoring and swimming conditions.

Booking Your Halloween Yacht Party

To reserve your date, contact us via WhatsApp. We recommend booking at least one week in advance for Halloween (late October). Pricing on request for boats not in Tier A or B. For more inspiration, read our Halloween party guide or explore all charter options.

Frequently asked questions

Can I decorate the yacht for a Halloween party?

Yes, you can bring your own decorations or arrange themed decor through us. Popular ideas include fake cobwebs, LED candles, and orange/black bunting. Just ensure decorations are non-toxic and safe for the marine environment.

What is the cost of a Halloween yacht party in Marbella?

Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours, including skipper, drinks, and snacks. Larger yachts like the Mangusta 80 cost from €4,719 for 4 hours, with a free jet ski included. Contact us via WhatsApp for custom quotes.

How many guests can I invite?

Capacity varies by boat: Astondoa 40 holds up to 9 passengers, Azimut 39 up to 11, and Mangusta 80 up to 12. For larger groups, consider the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) or Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax). All boats depart from Puerto Banús.

What is included in the charter?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT (21%). Themed catering or additional drinks can be arranged on request.

Can I play spooky music on board?

Yes, all our yachts have sound systems compatible with Bluetooth or AUX. You can bring your own playlist or request a Halloween-themed DJ for an additional fee.

Is it safe to swim in October?

October sea temperatures around Marbella average 20°C, which is comfortable for a quick dip. Our skippers know sheltered spots like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for calm swimming stops.

What time should I start the party?

Sunset in October is around 7:30 PM, making a late afternoon or early evening departure ideal for a spooky twilight atmosphere. Daytime charters also work well for family-friendly Halloween fun.

How do I book a Halloween yacht party?

Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and custom pricing. We recommend booking at least a week in advance for Halloween dates (late October).
